caption: A man sits in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" printed on the front, a black baseball cap with a gold emblem, and large over-ear headphones. He wears a gold chain with a pendant around his neck. He is positioned behind a professional microphone. In the background, white walls feature repeating black and gold text that reads "BOSS HUSTLE" and gold stars. To his right, large red and black text reads "BOSS TALK 101". A red and white logo on the left side of the screen says "BOSS TALK PODCAST", and a similar logo on the right reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, looking slightly to the side and then shifting his gaze toward the front, while his facial expression remains neutral. No other people are visible in the scene.
